lines.speaker: Ramocean
lines.text: What do you want? I am busy supervising!

lines.speaker: Ramocean
lines.text: This is the Hosidius Kitchen. Here, under my expert eye, we prepare the food that feeds most of the population.

lines.speaker: Ramocean
lines.text: Much of the income of Hosidius derives from trade in cooked food, so our work is vital.

lines.speaker: Ramocean
lines.text: Yes, you are most welcome to cook here. You may find you burn food less often under my supervision.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why don't you do some work yourself?

lines.speaker: Ramocean
lines.text: Excuse me? My cooking level is higher than you could imagine - I have already done my share of the work. Now, with my expertise, I am guiding future generations of chefs.

sections.title: After Talia has cooked the fish
After Talia has gotten more fish

lines.speaker: Ramocean
lines.text: Try not to burn this one.
